string.text: Quartermaster: "Varg, return to base. Some things have changed. You’ll receive additional instructions."
Clear Sky Liaison: "Head to the marked point. We need to talk."
Freedom Agent: "Stalker, stop beating around the bush. Come over, we need to talk. I’ll answer many questions you have."
Freedom Agent: "I warned you, but you didn’t listen. Next time might not be so lucky. Come back, kid… we’ll teach you how life works here."
Clear Sky Liaison: "Move to the designated point. And don’t do anything stupid."
Freedom Agent: "Move your ass here as fast as possible. This is urgent, so don’t delay."
Trader: "Varg, our men caught one of the bastards. Deal with these quickly and head to the marked area. Interrogate the bastard before our men finish him off."
Freedom Agent: "Well, bastard. Your moment has come. Shooting you is too easy and not fun. So we’re starting a survival game. Reach the base alive and you win. One knife is all you get."
Dolg Agent: "Alright… just shooting you is too simple. First, you’ll suffer. Play a game called 'Survive the Zone with One Knife.' Rules are clear — reach the base if you can."
Harold: "Varg, I have a job for you. Just your profile. Your intel on Hasan is confirmed. This problem needs solving."
Karim: "Hello. One of the radars you installed picked up something strange. You need to find out what it is immediately."
Hasan: "Varg, there’s a job for you. Fits your profile. You need to handle Harold quickly."
Czech: "Get to the tower quickly. Don’t respond to messages from your new friend Anubis. Or you’ll regret it."
Czech: "Varg, my fears are confirmed. Clear Sky won’t negotiate; they’ll just eliminate you. Kill them all."
Anubis: "Hello. I see you’ve caused a lot of trouble. Come over, we’ll talk and resolve all outstanding problems."
